_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Runtime exe/dll are now pinned to deterministic from-source outputs; setup_sha256 is a per-release installer artifact and is not enforced by the CI from-source hash gate. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
